displayName: Flat file-backed list (news / blog / docs feed)
about: The REFERENCE primitive of the constructor: a flat (depth-1), file-backed, multilingual list of documents. Composed by file copy + token substitution — no code generation. It exists to demonstrate the constructor's SEAMS so the next brick slots in without touching the core.

seams.list-provider: Slot A. The child list is supplied by providers/<source>/list-provider.ts.tpl, copied into the tab's _lib/list-provider.ts. files => parser-fs _list.generated. Swapping --source swaps ONLY this file; the contract is `getChildren()`.
seams.aspect-in-layout: Slot B. The tab carries a layout.tsx whose aspect slots compose enabled aspects uniformly at every level. i18n is on (the [lang] segment + chrome). roles is off by default; turning it on injects the SHARED client guard (@/lib/auth-guard/route-guard.client, static-first preserved) wrapping children + a fallback redirect — no change to depth or provider. Server-hide variant (role-guard.server, dynamic) is the documented architect-only exception, not injected.
seams.depth: depth-1 is the base case of the recursive depth parameter. A depth-N primitive nests hub levels; each level reuses the same provider + aspect seams.
seams.versioned-engine: The renderer is installed into lib/content-<engineVersion>/ + components/content-page-<engineVersion>/; the tab pins that version. brand/author are shared identity, never versioned.

params.tab: URL + folder slug, kebab-case (news, blog, documentation).
params.format: news | blog | document — JSON-LD + author-kind preset.
params.languages: BCP-47 codes; en is the base. One UI-chrome file per language.
params.labels: Section name per language (en required). The model translates the single word — not code generation.
params.samples: How many placeholder documents to compose (default 2).
params.roles: Access shape (Slot B). off=public (default) | guest=public+guest (anon→guest) | <ALL_ROLES csv>=private (one/several roles) | all=any assigned role. Validated against ALL_ROLES (lib/roles.ts).
params.unauthorizedRedirect: Fallback page for a visitor lacking the role: site root '/' (default) or any existing page (e.g. '/en/blog'). Only used when roles is on.
params.engineVersion: Which engine namespace to pin (default v1).
